title: Mawng Detailed 3D
description: A little resourcepack that add some details to some 3D blocks (NO Mods Needed)
body:
This is my first try at making a resourcepack that changes some 3D models of some Blocks.This works with **Vanilla Minecraft** (no depencies needed).

NEW 3D models for the most common funtional blocks.
![functional blocks and ladders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cde105f67c9da84c2e73e1a890ded0da290dfc2c.jpeg)

The 3D rail model is kinda weird-looking when placed going uphill but I think its fine.
![all the rail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0957ebd9c8acc256c6f6d6156a6c65d567c419b_0.webp)

I also tweaked some textures that I think will make it better:
- make grasses look more "bushy" and tall grasses no longer block your view
![new grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e28b6945138b86d359bd56bbf7a69eccee1aeca8.jpeg)
- diamond and netherite armor sets look more distinct.
![new armors textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e2909fe4b5002e8d5cd7eecef92510aedd6b10a.png)
- potato and wheat crops are more recognizable when fully grow. Together with nicer wet farmland.
![crops new textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8a7781d05b156b4a3e5f7d1b82f4cc8dac6ad5b.jpeg)
